page_content:
CMSC320 Introduction to Data Science (3 Credits) An introduction to the data science pipeline, i.e., the end-to-end process of going from unstructured, messy data to knowledge and actionable insights. Provides a broad overview of several topics including statistical data analysis, basic data mining and machine learning algorithms, large- scale data management, cloud computing, and information visualization. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in CMSC216 and CMSC250. Restriction: Permission of CMNS-Computer Science department. Credit Only Granted for: CMSC320, DATA320 or STAT426.
